projects.name: CardSense Web
projects.role: Frontend recommendation UX and calculator surface
projects.focus: Merchant-first calculator, My Wallet, trust result panel, mobile progressive disclosure

projects.name: CardSense API
projects.role: Deterministic recommendation API runtime and repository adapters
projects.focus: DecisionEngine, request validation, merchant matching, trust metadata passthrough, public POST protection

projects.name: CardSense Extractor
projects.role: Promotion extraction, normalization, import, and sync pipeline
projects.focus: Bank promo extraction, SQLite import, Supabase sync, atomic publish, credential policy

projects.name: CardSense Contracts
projects.role: Shared schemas, DTOs, taxonomies, merchant registry, stackability, benefit plans
projects.focus: Recommendation request/response schemas, trust fields, no-result fields, merchant taxonomy

projects.name: Fleet Command
projects.role: Workspace control plane, specs, dashboard, agent rules, and shared skills
projects.focus: Short Markdown source of truth plus dashboard for progress, health, checks, and evidence links
